hero_subtitle: SFTY helps compliance teams maintain an auditable record of KYC and KYB document verification decisions to support structured onboarding and regulatory review workflows.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Document verification audit trails lack clarity
problem_description: Onboarding teams struggle to maintain a clear, consistent record of document verification steps and decisions. This creates gaps in audit evidence that complicate compliance reviews and weaken the defensibility of onboarding outcomes.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY unifies document verification data, provider results, review actions and decision logs into one traceable audit trail so compliance teams maintain clear evidence of onboarding outcomes and verification steps.
workflow_title: From document verification to audit evidence
workflow_description: SFTY captures and organizes document verification outcomes, linking provider checks to risk reviews, cases, decisions and preserved audit evidence for compliance teams.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects document verification outputs into structured workflows, preserving audit evidence and decision history without replacing existing KYC and KYB providers.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs managing document verification with audit-grade evidence, provider orchestration and enterprise deployment for secure, traceable onboarding workflows and bank due diligence.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: Ask SFTY how document verification audit trails are preserved
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how onboarding workflows capture document verification evidence
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit logs support KYC and KYB decision review
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe how SFTY manages provider outputs in onboarding cases
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for VASP compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides VASP compliance teams a connected layer connecting KYC, KYB, document checks and risk rules into structured onboarding workflows with audit-ready case management and decision tracking.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY support document verification workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY orchestrates document verification outputs, applies risk-based policies, routes reviews, opens cases, records decisions and links evidence into a controlled onboarding process for clearer compliance oversight.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit evidence for onboarding?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves full audit trails including decision logs, supporting documents, provider results and approval records to support onboarding evidence is defensible and review-ready.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing KYC and KYB tools?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY connects outputs from multiple KYC, KYB and document verification providers into one compliance workflow without disrupting existing toolsets or operational stack.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC or KYB providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace KYC or KYB providers but integrates their outputs into connected, auditable workflows enhancing visibility and control for compliance teams.
final_description: Review how SFTY connects KYC and KYB provider outputs into structured, auditable onboarding workflows and evidence records.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
footer_contact_title: For supervisory, compliance and deployment discussions.
footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
